Introduction
    Siðasti bærinn í dalnum is a movie starring Þóra Borg-Einarsson, Jón Aðils, and Nína Sveinsdóttir. All farms except one in a beautiful Icelandic valley have been abandoned because of constant harassment from ferocious trolls. The...
